# Route 66 Background Style Guide

Use this style guide when generating Route 66 themed images (day and night) for the Road Trip Planner app.

- Focus on iconic Route 66 scenery: long straight roads, gentle curves, desert landscapes, vintage signage, and wide skies.
- Avoid showing specific branded signs, logos, or recognizable people.
- Composition:
  - Leave generous negative space for UI overlays (buttons, titles) near the lower third.
  - Keep the focal point slightly off-center for more cinematic framing.
- Day variant:
  - Warm, golden-hour lighting when possible.
  - Soft shadows, clear skies with light clouds.
  - Colors: warm yellows, oranges, and muted desert tones.
- Night variant:
  - Cooler color palette with deep blues and purples.
  - Visible road lights or car light trails, stars if appropriate.
  - Ensure sufficient contrast so white UI text remains legible.
- Family road trip tone:
  - Include hints of family travel (e.g., distant silhouettes of a van or SUV, multiple suitcases, or subtle reflections) without close-up faces.
- Orientation & aspect:
  - Generate masters large enough for both mobile portrait and desktop landscape crops.
  - Keep horizon roughly within the middle third of the frame.
